description: Inputs configured when creating the automation in Speckle.

ghFilePath.description: Name or path of the .gh file on the Compute server, e.g. 'facade_panels.gh'
ghFilePath.title: Grasshopper File Path

slabModelName.description: Model to send extracted slab curves to, e.g. 'slab/curves'
slabModelName.title: Slab Curves Model Name

facadeModelName.description: Model to send GH-generated facade panels to, e.g. 'facade/panels'
facadeModelName.title: Facade Panels Model Name

whisperMessage.description: Unused — required by Speckle Automate template.
whisperMessage.title: Whisper message

title: FunctionInputs
